'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 22''' is the twenty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' magazine, released on [[May 29]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Black Fleet Crisis|The Black Fleet Crisis]]
*[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]
*[[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] Cantina Characters
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]-[[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] Grand Arena
*[[IG-series/Legends|IG Assassin Droids]]
*[[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannon]]
*[[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|Trade Federation C-9979 Landing Ship]]
